ount":0,"listen_duration":180825,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":460094,"reply_count":11,"show_pv":137230},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7305432850189517606","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我来说说我感觉还是很不错滴，比大多数的好多了  多了 凡间历练应该就更有看头。还有这个这书最大的亮点，就是直接秒。不会像其他小说特别费事的讲这个东西。这是一个很大的优点，还有剧情也是比较有意思的。虽然说战力，有点崩盘。但总体问题不大。世界观，价值观都蛮好的。看到我一直想看。还有那种boss，会出现反转，很有意思。最后是对于反派的。没有帮反派一直写死。反派也是可以有价值的。这个点也是非常不错的一个点。总之很不错，建议看。还有吗，就是更新快点就好了。最后希望作者加油，不要烂尾。把这本书写的越来越好，也希望有个更好的作品。","text_exts":[{"e":145,"s":141,"text":"boss","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=boss&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177398183355F56A93%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227305432850189517606%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227091982715578223630%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22boss%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1700929310,"group_id":"7091982715578223630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3h9kyazr3QrSGTJoChQQPQ1kYysXIuHaCi3hjaE++zB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4336099400099454","user_name":"用户43360994"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4336099400099454","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7091982715578223630","book_info":{"abstract":"仙路诡奇，人道卑微。
